title: geranium pyrenaicum var. lusitanicum
intro: Geranium pyrenaicum var. lusitanicum, also known as the Lusitanian geranium, is a perennial plant species in the genus Geranium, native to the Iberian Peninsula. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of this plant include reducing symptoms of anxiety and stress, relieving menstrual cramps and other women's health issues, and promoting wound healing. The herbal preparations of Geranium pyrenaicum var. lusitanicum include infusions, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be used in traditional medicine and aromatherapy.
